title: Limonium companyonis
taxonomy: Limonium companyonis is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a succulent perennial that belongs to the genus Limonium. Limonium companyonis is native to the island of Sicily in Italy. The classification of Limonium companyonis is further categorized under the order Plumbaginales and the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Plumbaginaceae family, Limonium companyonis shares characteristics with other plants in this family.
